chart_zones.mos_note: Cycle phase (Insufficient Data) not favourable for entry — wait for accumulation or early uptrend.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

meta.data_note: No protocol fee or TVL data found for this token on DeFiLlama. Charts 1 and 2 are unavailable. Charts 3 and 4 show current-year supply and dilution data from CoinGecko.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 5.0/10 and survivability 56.7%. Base: 7.0% p.a., Bull: 13.0% p.a., Bear: -21.1% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. Protocol Fee DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. Fee/MC Multiple compares market cap to annual fees vs sector benchmarks. Holder Revenue uses fee revenue accruing directly to token holders. Network Activity (NVT) treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. Rank Benchmark anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. Dilution Adjustment penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods producing values outside 0.03x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
forecast_meta.price_history_note: Historical price data unavailable for this token. Forecast chart shows projected values only.

forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket B (Store of Value): Valued on scarcity and monetary premium. Monetary Premium measures share of gold market cap captured. Production Cost Floor provides a PoW mining-cost floor (×2 premium). Supply Adjusted Value penalises tokens with significant unlocked supply. Network Activity (NVT) treats volume as monetary circulation velocity. Rank Benchmark anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
forecast_meta.price_history_note: Limited price history available (2 year(s)). This token may be recently listed or have insufficient on-chain data.

KAS.iv_method: Monetary Premium, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark
